author: Jack Princz
name: 11-Layer Int6 + WD=0.04 + SWA + FA3
blurb: 11 layers with int6 per-row on all MLP+attention weights, int8 tok_emb, zstd-22. Weight decay 0.04 (Muon+AdamW) for quantization-friendly weights. SWA ~8 checkpoint average. OrthoInit + muP scaling. SmearGate + BigramHash(2048x128). FA3. Sliding window eval stride=64, seq=2048.
